title: Out of window but defect exception applies → approve recommended
customer_email: I ordered ord_2002 about six weeks ago and it arrived with a cracked casing. I filed a defect report right away but only now have time to follow up. Please process my refund. — Diego

envelope.agent_summary: Out of window (41 days) but a defect exception applies with a report on file. Approve recommended.
